name: PAX Mini & Plus USB-C Magnetic Charging Cable
summary: The PAX Mini & Plus USB-C Magnetic Charging Cable is an essential replacement accessory designed for reliable, efficient charging of PAX devices.
description: The PAX Mini & Plus USB-C Magnetic Charging Cable is an essential replacement accessory designed for reliable, efficient charging of PAX devices. Compatible with PAX Mini and PAX Plus, this cable features a precision magnetic connection that aligns seamlessly with the device for secure and consistent power delivery. Engineered for convenience and durability, the magnetic connector enables quick attachment and removal without direct insertion, helping to minimise wear on device charging contacts. The USB-C input ensures compatibility with modern charging adapters, making it a versatile solution for end users across multiple setups. Keeps your device charged and ready.
